name: Settings
description: A drill-in settings surface. A page-style NavigationBar (leading back + centered title) tops a vertical `list/nav` of grouped rows. A BottomSheet handles destructive confirmations (sign out, delete account) triggered from the rows below.

top.note: page variant — centered title with a leading back chevron.

body.note: nav variant auto-renders a trailing chevron per row. The `sign-out` row is the trigger for the overlay BottomSheet — destructive confirmation lives there, not inline.

props.title: Sign out of Chorus?
props.body: You will need to sign back in to access your channels.

overlay.note: Triggered by the `sign-out` row in body. Destructive primary action uses the button family's `destructive` flavor, not a separate component.

rules: Destructive commits land in the overlay BottomSheet (or a Dialog), never inline as a list row that fires on tap.
List variant must stay `nav` — the auto-rendered chevron is the affordance that signals drill-in.
Do not add a FAB to a Settings screen — there is no canonical commit at this level.
